query: INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, videoUrl, readingMaterial, assignment, lessonOrder) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Advanced Algebra', 'Explore systems of equations, quadratic equations, and polynomial expressions.', 'https://example.com/video/advanced-algebra', 'Advanced Algebra Concepts', 'Solve advanced problems', 9), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Functions and Graphing', 'Understand functions, function notation, and graphing techniques.', 'https://example.com/video/functions', 'Functions Guide', 'Graph and analyze functions', 10), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Statistics and Probability', 'Master mean, median, mode, standard deviation, and probability.', 'https://example.com/video/statistics', 'Statistics Reference', 'Analyze data and calculate probabilities', 11), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Measurement and Conversions', 'Learn measurement systems and unit conversions.', 'https://example.com/video/measurement', 'Measurement Guide', 'Convert units and solve problems', 12), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Calculator Strategies', 'Learn when and how to use calculator effectively on GED Math.', 'https://example.com/video/calculator', 'Calculator Strategies', 'Practice calculator techniques', 13);
